{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura family Matriarch
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Akura family Matriarch]] is capable of creating gatekeys with space-control abilities.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The battle between the [[Akura]] Matriarch and the [[Dreadgod]] damaged [[Ghostwater]]'s anchor [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
